mapper.select: SELECT t1.* FROM consultation_record t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MIN(created_time) as first_time, MAX(match_score) as max_score FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY first_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit} ) t2 ON t1.session_id = t2.session_id WHERE t1.deleted = 0 AND (t1.created_time = t2.first_time OR t1.match_score = t2.max_score) ORDER BY t1.created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT first_record.* FROM consultation_record first_record INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MIN(created_time) as first_time FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 AND (question LIKE #{keyword1} OR answer LIKE #{keyword2}) GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY first_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit} ) t2 ON first_record.session_id = t2.session_id AND first_record.created_time = t2.first_time WHERE first_record.deleted = 0 ORDER BY first_record.created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 AND (question LIKE #{keyword1} OR answer LIKE #{keyword2})
SELECT MAX(match_score) FROM consultation_record WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
